---
name: Skill Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing skill or reference file
title: "[Improvement] "
labels: improvement
assignees: ""
---

## File

Which skill or reference file? (e.g., `skills/craft-site/references/plugins/blitz.md`)

## Current Behavior

What does the skill currently say or do?

## Suggested Improvement

What should change? Be specific — include the corrected text, additional patterns, or missing information.

## Why

Why is this improvement needed? Did Claude generate incorrect code because of the current content?

## Evidence

Link to documentation, source code, or real-world examples that support the change.
